allow: PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://supabase.com" -Method Head -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { Write-Output "ERR supabase.com: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { Resolve-DnsName oasivruwsvhfmvynpbia.supabase.co -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -First 2 } catch { Write-Output "DNS ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($fn in @\('delete-user','notify-banker-appetite-rejected','notify-admin-new-user','notify-banker-advisor-interest','notify-advisor-case-approved','notify-user-approved'\)\) { Write-Output "--- $fn ---"; npx supabase functions download $fn })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.supabase\\access-token"\) { Write-Output "token file exists" } else { Write-Output "no token file"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.supabase" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name })
PowerShell(npx supabase db query "select pg_get_viewdef\('public.anonymous_cases'::regclass, true\) as def" --output json)
PowerShell(npx supabase db query --linked "select pg_get_viewdef\('public.anonymous_cases'::regclass, true\) as def, \(select relkind from pg_class where relname='anonymous_cases'\) as kind")

PowerShell(npx supabase db query --linked "select c.relname, c.reloptions, pg_get_userbyid\(c.relowner\) as owner, \(select array_agg\(privilege_type || ':' || grantee\) from information_schema.role_table_grants g where g.table_name='anonymous_cases'\) as grants from pg_class c where c.relname='anonymous_cases'")
